SEARCH
Package edu.bu.pas.risk.action

Record Class RedeemCardsAction

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
edu.bu.pas.risk.action.RedeemCardsAction
Record Components:
agentId - The agent performing this action.
card1 - The first card to trade-in.
card2 - The second card to trade-in.
card3 - The third card to trade-in.
All Implemented Interfaces:
Action, Cloneable
public record RedeemCardsAction(int agentId, TerritoryCard card1, TerritoryCard card2, TerritoryCard card3) extends Record implements Action
Redeems armies from the agent's owned territory cards.

Before performing this action, you can always calculate the number of troops you will redeem via 


     int tradeInNum = 1 + game.getNumPreviousRedemptions();
     int armiesRedeemed = TerritoryCard.getRedemptionAmount(tradeInNum);

  • Constructor Details

    • RedeemCardsAction

      public RedeemCardsAction(int agentId, List<TerritoryCard> cards)
      Redeems armies from the agent's owned territory cards.
      Parameters:
      agentId - The agent performing this action.
      cards - The list of 3 cards to trade-in.

    • RedeemCardsAction

      public RedeemCardsAction(int agentId, TerritoryCard card1, TerritoryCard card2, TerritoryCard card3)
      Creates an instance of a RedeemCardsAction record class.
      Parameters:
      agentId - the value for the agentId record component
      card1 - the value for the card1 record component
      card2 - the value for the card2 record component
      card3 - the value for the card3 record component

  • Method Details

    • apply

      public boolean apply(Game game) throws InvalidActionException
      Applies this action to the game.

      Actions are responsible for checking if the action itself is legal to be applied, and mutating the game state.

      Specified by:
      apply in interface Action
      Parameters:
      game - The game to apply the action to.
      Returns:
      true if the player got a +2 bonus.
      Throws:
      InvalidActionException - if the action was illegal in the game.

    • isTerminal

      public boolean isTerminal()
      Returns true iff this action represents an action that should end this agent's turn.
      Specified by:
      isTerminal in interface Action
      Returns:
      true if this action ends the turn.

      public RedeemCardsAction clone()
      Returns a deep copy of this action.
      Specified by:
      clone in interface Action
      Overrides:
      clone in class Object
      Returns:
      A cloned copy of this action.

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. Reference components are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object); primitive components are compared with '=='.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
